name: ourostack
description: Shared skills and plugin bundles for the Ouroboros agent ecosystem — the desk substrate (workspace conventions, lifecycle, friction registers, engineering posture) and the work-suite doing-phase skills (ideator / planner / doer / merger).

plugins.name: desk
plugins.description: A quiet room for a long-running agent's work — the universal substrate underneath whichever overlay (corporate worker, autonomous agent, personal coding agent) sits on top. Drawers for tracks, manilla envelopes for tasks, a corkboard for friction notes, a small reference shelf for lessons earned. Cross-context portable via the $DESK placeholder convention. Depends on work-suite for doing-phase skills.

plugins.name: work-suite
plugins.description: The four-phase workflow primitive used by orchestrator agents: work-ideator (explore), work-planner (scope), work-doer (execute with TDD), work-merger (PR + merge) — plus autopilot (long-horizon loop discipline) and inch-worm (open-ended improvement loop). Vendor-neutral, engine-agnostic plugin bundle.
